title: Kinda Scary Horror
description: A great modpack for a horror multiplayer series! It includes new entities, Vanilla+, and optimization mods.
body:
### ⚠️WARNING⚠️
### This modpack may include:
- #### Sudden Jumpscares
- #### Flashing lights
- #### Disturbing Imagery/Sounds
- #### Other things that may make it difficult to play the game normally
### This modpack is designed to be used as a horror modpack for people who want to have a bit more of a scare, and is NOT for pranks/scaring your friends without being told beforehand!
### Mobs this modpack adds:
- [Herobrine (From The Fog)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog)
- [Better Cave Dweller](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-cave-dweller)
- [Nocturnal Dweller](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocturnal-dweller)
- [The Anomaly](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-anomaly/version/1.9.0)
- [Siren Head: Java Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/siren-head-java-edition/version/2.1.6)
### This modpack also adds:
- [Worldhost for hosting on singleplayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host/version/0.5.0+1.20.1-forge)
- [Farmer's Delight so you can have a better option for getting food](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight/version/1.20.1-1.2.5)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/15.20.0.105)
- [Simple Voice Chat so you can talk to friends](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/forge-1.20.1-2.5.26)
- [Fresh Animations so the normal mobs are more lively](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/version/1.9.2)
- [Xaero's Minimap so you don't get lost and you know where the mobs are](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/version/24.6.1_Forge_1.20)
### You can look at [the dependencies](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ksh-modpack/version/1.3.0) for the full list.
